$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026. 9th canonical instance of D12 cycle JSON sub-shape (4th in S3). **Combined multi-file binary commit** sub-variant (2nd canonical instance of this micro-shape; cycle 117 was 1st → cycle 119 graduates skill_combined_multi_file_binary_commit at 3rd instance counted with this cycle). 2 distinct micro-shapes within this single combined cycle: (a) prose-compression for canonical-content page (what-is-adna) + (b) style-extraction (tutorials [...slug].astro = 2nd canonical of cycle-118 style-extraction-to-canonical-stylesheet pattern → graduates skill_style_extraction_to_canonical_stylesheet if 3rd instance not surfaced).

target_surfaces: site/src/pages/learn/what-is-adna.astro (134 lines pre-streamline; canonical 'what is aDNA' explainer) — M5.0 §3 D12 cycle 119a mandate: 134 → ~100
site/src/pages/learn/tutorials/[...slug].astro (102 lines pre-streamline; dynamic-route tutorial renderer with 50 lines inline <style>) — M5.0 §3 D12 cycle 119b mandate: ~variable
site/src/pages/vaults/[slug].astro (95 lines pre-streamline; dynamic-route vault detail page) — M5.0 §3 D12 cycle 119c mandate: ~variable
step_1_capture_state.method: Read all 3 files + structural outline + apply differentiated recipe per page (prose compression for what-is-adna; style extraction for tutorials [...slug]; evaluation-only disposition for vaults [slug])

what_is_adna.structure: Frontmatter (1-10) + DocumentationLayout open + lede (12-18) + 'The problem' H2 (20-23; 2 paragraphs) + 'Why aDNA exists' H2 (25-28; 2 paragraphs) + 'The aDNA approach' H2 (30-36; lede + 3 <li>) + h3 'directory-structure' + code block (38-51) + h3 '14 entity types' + table (53-73) + h3 'claude-md-example' + 21-line code block (75-98) + 'Before and after' H2 (100-105; 3 paragraphs) + 'Self-reference' H2 (107-115; lede + 4 <li>) + 'Three-question test' H2 (117-124) + 'Explore further' H2 (126-133; 5 <li>)
what_is_adna.canonical_content_load_bearing: this page is THE canonical 'what is aDNA' explainer — it carries the problem framing + 3-thing solution + concrete directory + entity table + real CLAUDE.md snippet + before/after + self-reference proof. Most line-bulk is the 2 code blocks (~35 lines) + 14-row table (~20 lines) + claude-md-snippet which CANNOT be compressed without losing the page's pedagogical purpose.

tutorials_slug.structure: Frontmatter with imports + getStaticPaths + render call + totalTime ISO extraction + jsonLD array (1-39) + DocumentationLayout (41-54; minimal markup: difficulty badge + estimated time + <Content /> + TryInClaudeCode) + 47 lines inline <style> for difficulty badges (55-101)
tutorials_slug.load_bearing_preserve: dynamic getStaticPaths over guides collection + Content rendering + difficulty-badge styling (beginner/intermediate/advanced + dark-mode variants + WCAG AA contrast ratios documented inline)

vaults_slug.structure: Frontmatter with vaultsData import + getStaticPaths over vaults (1-15) + main layout with hero + persona conditional + focus conditional + VaultRelationshipBlock + ADRs conditional + missions conditional + links section + note conditional (17-85) + 10 lines inline <style> (87-95)
vaults_slug.load_bearing_preserve: dynamic getStaticPaths over vaults.json + 6 conditional sections render only when corresponding field exists + minimal raw-hex color CSS for tagline/meta/mission-state badges
vaults_slug.streamline_opportunity_assessment: 10-line inline <style> is BELOW the cycle-118 NEW SEED threshold (skill_style_extraction_to_canonical_stylesheet candidate criterion: > 80 lines of inline page-scoped CSS). Conditional sections are all distinct (persona / focus / ADRs / missions / links / note) — no redundancy to excise. Hex color literals (#666 / #444 / #555 / #fef1d1 / #b9e4d0 / #e7e7e7) could migrate to design tokens but the tokens may not exist for all of them (state-pending palette is unique to this page). DECISION: evaluation-only disposition — no streamline change. Document in cycle JSON.

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: Cycle 119 = combined multi-file binary commit (2nd canonical of cycle-117 pattern → GRADUATES skill_combined_multi_file_binary_commit with this 3rd-instance-counted cycle). Differentiated recipe per page: (a) what-is-adna gets prose compression with canonical-content preservation discipline — compress 'The problem' 2-para → 1-para; 'Why aDNA exists' 2-para → 1-para; 'Before and after' intro tightening; 'Self-reference' <li> compression; preserve all code blocks + entity table + the 3 canonical artifacts; (b) tutorials [...slug] gets style extraction to site/src/styles/tutorial-meta.css (2nd canonical of cycle-118 NEW SEED → seed advances 2/3); (c) vaults [slug] gets evaluation-only — no streamline opportunity surfaces per the assessment above; cycle JSON documents the disposition. Combined target: ~280 lines (was 331).

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A across the 3 surfaces; what-is-adna persona Q&A focused on Conciseness + Cognitive_Load + canonical-content preservation; tutorials [...slug] persona Q&A focused on Source_Organization + Information_Architecture; vaults [slug] persona Q&A focused on Streamline_Opportunity (eval-only disposition)
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style (canonical-content prose register — explainer-imperative; should preserve concrete examples and the 'show, don't tell' demonstrative pattern) + Q2 Clarity (problem → solution → concrete example arc — preserve the arc) + Q3 Conciseness (canonical content pages compress less aggressively than adopter-conversion pages; per writing-guidelines.mdx §3 contract concept page target 300-600 lines — what-is-adna at 127 is well below the upper bound) + Q4 Bloat (intro paragraphs to 'The problem' and 'Why aDNA exists' had some redundancy; before/after had a redundant lede; self-reference list items were verbose — these compress without losing the canonical artifacts) + Q5 Comprehension (does a newcomer still walk away with: 1. what aDNA is, 2. what the structure looks like, 3. what a CLAUDE.md is, 4. why this page itself proves the standard? All 4 preserved.)
step_2_persona_qa.design_question_at_cycle_entry: What-is-adna compression target vs canonical-content load-bearing? Modest reduction acceptable. The page IS the canonical explainer — code blocks (directory + claude-md), 14-entity table, and concrete before/after example are the page's reason for existing. Aggressive compression would defeat the purpose. Compress only redundant intro paragraphs + tighten <li> items + remove duplicate lede sentences. Trade-off accepted: 134 → 127 is below typical D12 cycle reductions (40-70%); cycle JSON documents the canonical-content-preservation discipline as the explicit reason.

persona_consensus.anti_bloat_editor: What-is-adna: modest 134 → 127 (5.2%) reflects canonical-content preservation — code blocks + entity table + claude-md snippet account for >60 lines that CANNOT compress without losing the page's pedagogical purpose. Realistic reduction came from intro-paragraph deduplication ('The problem' 2-para → 1-para; 'Why aDNA exists' 2-para → 1-para; 'Before and after' intro absorbed into examples). Tutorials [...slug]: 102 → 52 (49%) via clean style extraction matches cycle-118 pattern; ALL inline CSS moved to canonical site/src/styles/tutorial-meta.css. Vaults [slug]: 95 → 95 with disposition note. Combined 331 → 274 (17.2%) is modest but the pattern is correct. Pre-change: 3.0/3.5/3.0 → post 4.0/4.5/3.5 (vaults retains pre score since unchanged).
persona_consensus.ux_writer: What-is-adna voice: explainer-imperative preserved. Compression touched bloat (redundant intros, duplicate ledes) not content (canonical examples). 'The problem' compresses 2 paragraphs into 1 by absorbing the 'this isn't an agent capability problem' frame into the main paragraph. 'Before and after' removes 'Here is what the same project looks like' meta-intro. Tutorials [...slug]: source-side voice is unchanged (page just moves CSS to a stylesheet). Vaults [slug]: unchanged. Score 4.5/5.0 + 4.5/5.0 + 4.0/5.0 (no change).
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: What-is-adna: newcomer still gets the 4-beat arc (problem → 3-thing solution → concrete examples → self-reference proof) in <2 min. Cognitive_Load: 3.5 → 4.0 (canonical-content limits ceiling). Tutorials [...slug]: rendered output identical; source-side cleaner for future contributors. Vaults [slug]: unchanged. Score progression matches.
persona_consensus.information_architect: What-is-adna: IA fully preserved (H2/h3 nesting; code-block → table → code-block pedagogical pattern). Tutorials [...slug]: page IA preserved; styles moved to canonical site/src/styles/ (alongside branding.css + global.css + tokens.css + glossary.css [from cycle 118] + tutorial-meta.css [new]). Vaults [slug]: IA preserved (no change). 6th canonical instance of 'page-scope concern separation' across the M5.4 mission.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 4/4 personas approve differentiated combined-cycle approach. Implementation: (a) what-is-adna canonical-content-preserving prose compression; (b) tutorials [...slug] style extraction to canonical stylesheet; (c) vaults [slug] evaluation-only disposition (no streamline opportunity surfaced per assessment). Combined multi-file binary commit per Risk #7 + 2nd canonical of cycle-117 pattern. Single binary commit covers 2 modified files + 1 evaluated-no-change documented in cycle JSON.

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO image generation — text-only D12 cycle. No assets touched.
